title: Score of adoption and implementation of national DRR strategies in line with the Sendai Framework
description:
The indicator is derived from the series SG_DSR_LGRGSR and it is part of the SDG indicators 1.5.3, 11.b.1, 13.1.2. 
It assesses the adoption and implementation of national disaster risk reduction (DRR) strategies in alignment with the Sendai Framework. It evaluates countries' progress towards disaster resilience and risk reduction strategies in line with SDG targets.
source: United Nations Office for Disaster Risk Reduction (2024)

collections.title: SDG Goal 11: Make cities and human settlements inclusive, safe, resilient and sustainable
SDG Goal 13: Take urgent action to combat climate change and its impacts
